_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative Analysis Identifies Candidate Tumor Microenvironment and Intracellular Signaling Pathways that Define Tumor Heterogeneity in NF1.

_contextSnippet: median accuracy scores: cNF = 0.97, MPNST = 0.67, NF = 0.67, pNF = 0.57... Using the top 40 set of LVs, we were able to improve model performance... median accuracy scores: cNF = 1.00, MPNST = 0.86, NF = 0.86, pNF = 0.75
details: Achieved median accuracy scores of cNF = 0.97, MPNST = 0.67, NF = 0.67, pNF = 0.57 with full feature set, improved to cNF = 1.00, MPNST = 0.86, NF = 0.86, pNF = 0.75 with top 98 LVs
